name: Submit a workflow idea
about: Suggest a new multi-step workflow for the library. No technical knowledge required.
title: "[WORKFLOW] Your workflow name here"
labels: workflow-submission
assignees: ''
---

# Workflow submission

Thanks for contributing! Fill in the sections below as best you can. Don't worry if you can't answer everything — the maintainer will follow up with any questions.

---

## Workflow name

*What would you call this workflow? (e.g. "Regulatory Impact Statement", "Media Release Draft", "Grant Assessment Summary")*

---

## Domain

*Which area of APS work does this sit in? Pick the closest one:*

- [ ] Policy Development (briefing notes, policy options, QT briefs, regulatory advice)
- [ ] Program Delivery & Operations (grants, program logic, risk, process improvement)
- [ ] Stakeholder Engagement & Communications (consultations, plain language, comms plans, ministerial correspondence)
- [ ] Data Analysis & Evaluation (data summaries, evaluation frameworks, performance reporting)
- [ ] Compliance & Governance (PSPF, PGPA, privacy, AI ethics reviews)
- [ ] General Productivity (meetings, email, document review)

---

## Who is this for?

*What APS level or role would typically use this? (e.g. APS 5-6 program officers, EL1 policy analysts, all levels)*

---

## What task does it address?

*In 2–4 sentences: what is the officer trying to accomplish? What's the starting point (e.g. a pile of notes, a ministerial request, a dataset) and what's the end result (e.g. a 2-page brief, a stakeholder list, a summary table)?*

---

## Why isn't this covered by existing workflows?

*Have a look at the live workflows at public-service-prompt-gallery.netlify.app. What's different or missing about what you're describing?*

---

## Rough steps

*If you had to break this task into 3–6 steps, what would they be? Rough notes are fine — this doesn't need to be polished.*

1.
2.
3.
4.
5.
6.

---

## Compliance frameworks relevant

*Does this workflow touch any of the following? Tick all that apply.*

- [ ] PGPA Act (public money, accountability for decisions and advice)
- [ ] PSPF (information classification and protective security)
- [ ] Privacy Act (personal information handling)
- [ ] APS Values (impartiality, accountability, ethics)
- [ ] FOI Act (document discoverability)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

*Other compliance notes:*

---

## Anything else?

*Any context that would help — agency, portfolio, real examples you've tried, tools you've used, edge cases that matter.*
